title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is a desktop-based advancement over Claude Chat that reads files locally without upload limits, maintains a larger context window to preserve conversation history longer, and outputs ready-to-use files directly to the user's file system. The video highlights three main improvements: removal of the 20-file and 30MB per-file constraints, reduced context window compaction during long conversations, and direct file delivery instead of chat-based outputs.
